summary: Frontend-only Playwright testing of Dark Neomorphism portfolio for Om Patel. All 12 requested features verified on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). Hero, header nav (all 5 sections), About + animated DataPipelineDiagram (4 nodes: Source Systems, Ingestion, Transform, Data Warehouse), Experience (EllisDon, DIGIBEE), 3 skill categories, 3 projects with result badges, separate Education and Certifications containers, Contact tagline 'Got data stuck and need to have it transformed with analytics?', mailto Request Resume buttons (header/hero/contact/mobile) all point to patelomr07@gmail.com with correct subject/body, footer back-to-top, and mobile hamburger menu — all pass. No console errors.
critical_code_review_comments: DRY: resumeMailto is now centralized in mockData.js — good. Consider also extracting the tagline sentence to mockData for consistency.
DataPipelineDiagram: node labels are positioned using CSS mt-10 below icon inside a translate-y-1/2 wrapper — visually renders below nodes; verified all 4 labels visible.
Footer scrollY after back-to-top was 9 (not exactly 0) because smooth scroll may still be in-flight; acceptable but consider stronger assertion tolerance or wait.

Header brand shows 'OM_P.' on desktop but screenshot showed 'OM_F.' on mobile viewport — appears to just be a rendering artifact/font; verify brand text is consistent (may be a visual overlap issue with menu icon). Non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Static portfolio, no backend. Verified data-testids: site-header, brand-link, desktop-nav, nav-{about,experience,skills,projects,contact}, resume-request-btn, mobile-menu-toggle, mobile-menu, mobile-nav-*, mobile-resume-btn, hero-section, hero-headline, hero-summary, hero-image, hero-resume-btn, hero-scroll-btn, about-section, data-pipeline-diagram, projects-section, project-{0,1,2}, education-section, education-{0,1}, certifications-section, certification-{0,1}, contact-section, contact-{email,phone,linkedin,location}, contact-resume-btn, site-footer, footer-back-to-top. Expected mailto: mailto:patelomr07@gmail.com?subject=Resume%20Request%20-%20Data%20Engineer&body=... (see personalInfo.resumeMailto).
